name: Blender Mayonnaise
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the egg, vinegar, salt, dry mustard, paprika, and cayenne in a blender container.
2. Blend until well mixed.
3. With the blender running slowly, gradually pour half of the salad oil into the blender container.
4. Use a rubber spatula to scrape down the sides if necessary.
5. Add the lemon juice to the mixture in the blender.
6. Slowly pour the remainder of the salad oil into the blender container while the blender is running.
7. Makes about 1 1/4 cups.
